reason_for_decision: Well-structured and practical, with strong zone-based reasoning for how warehouse surveillance should actually be designed.
strengths: Breaks the site into perimeter, dock, building-edge, and transition problems instead of treating the property as one camera grid.
Explains loading docks and truck courts in a way that feels operationally true to warehouse work rather than generic surveillance advice.
Adds good buyer and operator value through verification logic, occlusion awareness, and reconstruction-focused design judgment.
summary_assessment: A strong deployment article with clear operational framing, useful zoning logic, and practical surveillance design judgment for logistics properties.
